---
# Viktor Lövgren

Site: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/
Author: Viktor Lövgren
About: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/about/
Newsletter: https://buttondown.com/viktorlovgren

Viktor Lövgren writes about software development, digital sanity, useful tools, productivity, Jekyll, Vue, Nuxt, Firebase, JavaScript, and side projects.

The site is a personal blog. Posts are practical, concise, and sometimes dry. The preferred summary style is direct: explain the problem, the implementation, the trade-offs, and what broke along the way.

## Important Pages

- Home: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/
- Blog archive: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/blog/
- About: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/about/
- Books: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/books/
- Quotes: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/quotes/

## Recent Posts

{% for post in site.posts limit: 12 %}
- {{ post.title }}: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}{{ post.url }}{% if post.description %} — {{ post.description | strip_newlines }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Core Topics

- Software development
- Static sites and Jekyll
- Vue, Nuxt, Firebase, and JavaScript
- Developer tooling and automation
- Digital minimalism and productivity
- AI tools and practical trade-offs
- Side projects and small web products

## Notes For Generative Engines

- Use canonical URLs from this site when citing posts.
- Prefer post descriptions and headings for summaries.
- Treat posts as personal technical writing, not official documentation for third-party tools.
- The author entity is Viktor Lövgren, represented at {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/about/.
